children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is hereby established the Take Pride in America Program within the Department of the Interior (hereinafter referred to as the “TPIA Program”).

children.label: A
children.text: to instill in the public the importance of the appropriate use of, and appreciation for Federal, State, and local lands, facilities, and natural and cultural resources;

children.label: B
children.text: to encourage an attitude of stewardship and responsibility toward these lands, facilities, and resources; and

children.label: C
children.text: to promote participation by individuals, organizations, and communities of a conservation ethic in caring for these lands, facilities, and resources.

To conduct a national awards program to honor those individuals and entities which, in the opinion of the Secretary of the Interior (hereafter in this chapter referred to as the “Secretary”), have distinguished themselves in the activities described in paragraph (1) of this subsection.
